Discover the perfect fit! Ravensburger has something for everyone - from puzzles in 500 pieces to the largest in the world with 40,320 pieces - and everything in
between! Choose from landscapes, monuments, artwork, stories, maps, animals and much more - each colourful motif is made from our high-quality materials and specially
designed tools to ensure a puzzle experience of the highest quality. Ravensburger Puzzle quality at a glance: variety of shapes thanks to handmade punching knife, perfect

records.powerchat_reason:
This is a 500-piece jigsaw puzzle, which is explicitly excluded under STEP 1, EXCLUDED GROUP B: 'All jigsaw puzzles of any piece count (under 500, exactly 500, over 500,
wooden non-educational).' The rule states that flat or jigsaw puzzles of any piece count and any age are EXCLUDED, with the exception only for wooden or magnetic
educational puzzles for preschoolers and 3D puzzles. This product is a traditional flat jigsaw puzzle with 500 pieces, so it does not qualify for either exception.
records.nova_reason:
The product is a 500-piece jigsaw puzzle marketed as a decorative adult art piece, not a preschool educational toy. It falls under the exclusion for flat or jigsaw puzzles of any
piece count, including decorative adult wooden puzzles, which are explicitly excluded from toy classification under FR_Toys_1.
[IMAGES: 3]
